name: Golden Lemon Marmalade
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the carrots and lemon quarters through a large blade chopper (yielding about 3 cups of chopped carrots and ¾ cup of chopped lemon).
2. In a large kettle, combine all ingredients except the maraschino cherries.
3. Bring the mixture to a full rolling boil.
4. Reduce heat to medium and cook for 30 minutes.
5. Stir in the maraschino cherries and continue cooking for an additional 3-5 minutes until thick. The mixture should sheet off a spoon when tested with cold water.
6. Pour into hot, sterilized jars.
7. Seal with hot paraffin wax.
Makes 4½ pints.
